summary: Completed comprehensive testing of cryptocurrency payments feature. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All flows working correctly - package selection, crypto selection, payment creation, wallet address display, simulate confirmation, and confirmation page.

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests

critical_code_review_comments: Good: CoinGecko API integration with 60-second caching to avoid rate limits
Good: Fallback prices implemented if CoinGecko API fails (BTC: $95k, ETH: $3.5k, stablecoins: $1)
Good: Payment expiration after 30 minutes with proper status tracking
Good: Demo wallet addresses correctly prefixed - bc1 for Bitcoin, 0x for Ethereum/tokens
Good: QR code data generation using bitcoin: and ethereum: URI schemes
Good: Proper confirmation tracking with confirmations_required (3 for BTC, 12 for ETH)
Good: Frontend 3-step progress indicator with clear visual feedback
Good: Copy to clipboard functionality for wallet address and amount
Good: Real-time price updates showing crypto equivalent for selected package
Note: Demo mode uses static wallet addresses - production would generate unique addresses per payment
seed_data_creation: Multiple crypto payments created during testing - stored in crypto_payments collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Crypto payments feature fully implemented with 4 supported coins (BTC, ETH, USDC, USDT). 2) CoinGecko API used for real-time price conversion - free tier with rate limits. 3) Payment flow: Select package/crypto -> Create payment (requires auth) -> Display wallet/QR -> Simulate confirmation (demo mode). 4) Payments stored in crypto_payments MongoDB collection with proper user_id association. 5) QR code is a placeholder icon - actual QR generation would need library like qrcode.react.

get_supported_cryptos.notes: Returns BTC, ETH, USDC, USDT with network info and confirmation requirements

get_crypto_prices.notes: Returns live prices from CoinGecko with caching. BTC ~$68k, ETH ~$1.9k, stablecoins ~$1

usd_to_crypto_conversion.notes: Converts USD to crypto with current exchange rate. Validates crypto_id and positive amount

create_crypto_payment.notes: Creates payment record with wallet address, QR data, 30-min expiration. Requires auth

get_payment_status.notes: Returns payment status, confirmations, expiration. Auto-marks expired payments

simulate_payment_confirmation.notes: Demo endpoint - sets confirmations and status to confirmed. Idempotent for already-confirmed

get_payment_history.notes: Returns user's payment history sorted by created_at desc. Excludes MongoDB _id

get_packages_with_crypto.notes: Returns all 7 notary packages with crypto pricing for all 4 supported coins

frontend_checkout_page.notes: 3-step checkout: Select package/crypto -> Payment details with wallet -> Confirmation

frontend_crypto_selection.notes: 4 crypto options with live prices, proper selection highlighting

frontend_payment_flow.notes: Creates payment, displays wallet address, QR placeholder, status tracking, expiration timer

frontend_simulate_confirmation.notes: Demo button triggers confirmation, transitions to step 3 with payment details

frontend_design.notes: Dark theme with good contrast, orange accent, proper spacing, footer present
